title: Secondary Click
description: This is a minecraft mod for Fabric that adds secondary keybinds for left and right click.
body:
This is a minecraft mod for Fabric that adds secondary keybinds for left and right click.

The added keybinds can be used with every key on your keyboard. When you hold down the bound key, the game will spam that action, just like when you bind your normal use / attack to a key.
